description: Fix WebSocket frame clear race condition and dialog test promise leak in browser-tools.e2e.ts, and add try/finally for page.close() in SDK and structured error test files to prevent resource leaks on assertion failure.

userStories.title: Fix WebSocket frame clear race condition and dialog unbounded promise in browser-tools.e2e.ts
userStories.description: As a CI maintainer, I want the WebSocket clear test to use polling like the network capture tests and the dialog test to have a bounded promise so that tests don't flake from timing races or hang on missing dialogs.
acceptanceCriteria: The 'clear=true empties the WebSocket frame buffer' test (around lines 2020-2024) uses a polling pattern (waitFor or similar) to verify the buffer stays empty across multiple checks, rather than a single-shot assertion
The dialog test promise (around lines 2579-2588) has a timeout guard that rejects with a descriptive error if the dialog event never fires within a reasonable window (e.g., 10 seconds)
The dialog event listener is cleaned up after the test completes

userStories.title: Add try/finally for page.close() in structured-errors, sdk-fetch-errors, and sdk-utilities test files
userStories.description: As a CI maintainer, I want pages to be closed even when assertions fail so that leaked pages don't generate background network requests that interfere with other tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Every test in structured-errors.e2e.ts wraps its body in try/finally with page.close() in the finally block
Every test in sdk-fetch-errors.e2e.ts wraps its body in try/finally with page.close() in the finally block
Every test in sdk-utilities.e2e.ts wraps its body in try/finally with page.close() in the finally block
